name: Lemon Pudding Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 large egg yolks at room temperature
1/3 cup freshly squeezed lemon juice, strained
1 cup light cream at room temperature
2 large egg whites at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter well in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add 3/4 cup sugar in two additions, beating for one minute after each portion added.
3. Blend in the egg yolks, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Beat in the lemon juice and rind; beat in flour and cream.
5. Beat egg whites on moderately high speed in a small deep bowl until frothy.
6. Add cream of tartar; continue beating until soft peaks form.
7. Add remaining 3/4 cup sugar; beat until firm but moist peaks form.
8. Stir in a spoonful of the egg whites into the lemon mixture, then fold in the remaining egg whites.
9. Gently pour the filling into the baked pie shell.
10. Bake at 400 degrees for 10 minutes, reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees and continue baking about 25 minutes or until the top is well risen and firm to the touch.
11. Transfer to a cooling rack. Cool completely; refrigerate 6 hours before serving.
